\tzpentry{ID3391}{Gyromagnetic Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3391 introduces Gyromagnetic Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \Omega_{FD} = \frac{GJ}{c^2 r^3} \quad \text{(analog with } J = I\omega_{gyro}\text{)} $$
